description: You are a Spatial Data Engineer configuring GeoServer to publish filtered geospatial features via WFS. Log in to GeoServer at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (admin / Admin123!). Configure the WFS global service settings to be enabled with the title 'Natural Earth WFS' and a maximum of 5000 features. In the 'ne' workspace, publish a new layer named 'major_cities' using a SQL view from the existing PostGIS datastore with the query 'SELECT * FROM ne_populated_places WHERE pop_max > 1000000' (geometry column: 'wkb_geometry', type: Point, SRID: 4326). Create an SLD style named 'city_marker' featuring a red (#FF0000) circle mark of 8 pixels and assign it as the default style for the ne:major_cities layer.
